india_trends.title: Havells India ends FY26 on a weak note; will FY27 be any better?
india_trends.summary: Havells India capped off a weak FY26 with a 6% dip in Q4 Ebitda, driven by persistent losses in its Lloyd appliance division and rising input costs. Despite strong demand for industrial cables, analysts are trimming EPS estimates as the company faces a steep climb toward margin recovery in FY27.
